intentSynonyms: show me my events in gcal
see all my events in gcal
list events on a calendar in gcal
description: List events on a calendar. Returns upcoming events by default. Use timeMin/timeMax to specify a date range. Use q to search event text. Results are ordered by start time when singleEvents is true.

time_min.description: Lower bound (inclusive) for event start time as ISO 8601 timestamp

time_max.description: Upper bound (exclusive) for event start time as ISO 8601 timestamp

q.description: Free text search terms to find events matching these terms in summary, description, location, attendee name, etc.

max_results.description: Maximum number of events to return (default 25, max 2500)

page_token.description: Token for fetching the next page of results

single_events.description: Whether to expand recurring events into instances (default true)

order_by.description: Sort order: startTime (requires singleEvents=true) or updated (default startTime)

show_deleted.description: Whether to include deleted events (default false)
